mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.title, a.author_id, a.author_name, a.created_at, a.views, a.team, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.board_comment c WHERE c.board_id = a.id AND (c.is_deleted = 0 OR c.is_deleted IS NULL)) AS comment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.archive_file f WHERE f.board_id = a.id) AS file_count FROM vibe.team_archive a WHERE a.team = #{team} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vibe.team_archive (id, title, content, author_id, author_name, created_at, views, team) VALUES (#{id}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, #{team,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: UPDATE vibe.team_archive SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
